description_en: Bandung, in Indonesia, is a halal-friendly destination with a Halal Trust Score of 4.5/5. Muslim travelers will find 39 halal restaurants listed, 1 mosques, real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — a complete guide to travel with peace of mind.
